installCommand: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install --no-audit --no-fund; elif [ -f web/package.json ]; then (cd web && npm install --no-audit --no-fund); else echo 'package.json not found' && exit 1; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build; elif [ -f web/package.json ]; then (cd web && npm run build); else echo 'package.json not found' && exit 1; fi
